pattern_report: 18-24 audiences drive a 114% stronger performance score versus baseline, with 37% lower CVR and 52% lower CPA across 1 campaigns.
18-25 audiences drive a 94% stronger performance score versus baseline, with 31% lower CVR and 54% lower CPA across 2 campaigns.
18-30 audiences drive a 75% stronger performance score versus baseline, with 24% lower CVR and 55% lower CPA across 1 campaigns.
Ugc_Video creatives deliver a 114% stronger performance score, 37% lower CVR, and 52% lower CPA while sustaining 3.5% CTR across 1 campaigns.
Video creatives deliver a 94% stronger performance score, 31% lower CVR, and 54% lower CPA while sustaining 3.5% CTR across 2 campaigns.
Image creatives deliver a 26% stronger performance score, 11% lower CVR, and 43% lower CPA while sustaining 2.8% CTR across 2 campaigns.
cmp_005_linkedin_exec_report is overspending relative to history, with CPA at 105.56 on 7600.00 spend while only converting at 9.5%.
cmp_002_google_search_saas_demo is overspending relative to history, with CPA at 67.71 on 6500.00 spend while only converting at 4.2%.
TikTok campaigns average 3.5% CTR and 3.3% CVR, driving a 114% stronger score than the portfolio average.
Meta campaigns average 2.8% CTR and 4.7% CVR, driving a 26% stronger score than the portfolio average.
Google Ads campaigns average 2.6% CTR and 4.2% CVR, driving a 47% weaker score than the portfolio average.
The scale winners cluster contains 2 campaigns with 3.7% average CVR and 23.75 CPA.
The efficient converters cluster contains 1 campaigns with 5.4% average CVR and 34.78 CPA.
The at risk cluster contains 2 campaigns with 6.8% average CVR and 86.63 CPA.
